sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91895" key="*purwni/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Πῡρωνία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n91895.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">presiding over the purchase of wheat</tr_>, epith. of Artemis, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:8:15:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.15.9</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
